oneLiner: A concise explainer that shows where margin disappears, which drivers are thriving, and what to fix first.
problemPoints: Margin analysis was scattered across exports, spreadsheets, and intuition.
Dispatch and finance were reacting to different numbers and different timelines.
Root causes were hard to explain clearly in leadership reviews.
solutionPoints: The dashboard pulls labor, fuel, insurance, and rental costs into one view.
Operators can spot expensive trends quickly instead of rebuilding the math manually.
Weekly reviews become calmer, faster, and anchored in the same dataset.

features.title: Unified operating view
features.detail: See the cost stack in one place instead of bouncing between systems.

features.title: Driver-level detail
features.detail: Review payroll, gallons, miles, and blended CPM for each operator.

features.title: Per-load economics
features.detail: Stress-test assumptions before a weak load becomes a recurring habit.

features.title: Update checklist
features.detail: Keep the workflow repeatable so the story stays trustworthy every week.

metrics.label: Review prep
metrics.detail: Less manual assembly before leadership check-ins.

metrics.label: Decision speed
metrics.detail: Operators can respond while the issue is still fresh.

metrics.label: Team alignment
metrics.detail: Finance and ops discuss one operating picture, not conflicting exports.

ctaTitle: Turn your internal project into a story people understand fast.
ctaBody: Swap in your own project copy, screenshots, voiceover, and captions, then render a reusable explainer for customers, teammates, or investors.
